message:
test(extras): add 18 unit tests for doom/wad_types.rs

Covers WAD binary format parsing helpers and name conversion:
- lump_name_str: full names, 8-char names, empty, lowercase
- DirEntry/RawSideDef/RawSector name accessors
- parse::i16_le, u16_le, i32_le, name8 (positive, negative, offset)
- LineDef/Thing flag constants and NF_SUBSECTOR

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
